title: Drehmal + QOL
description: Required + some QOL mods for Drehmal: Apotheosis 2.2.2
body:
# This modpack contains all the necessary mods and the resourcepack for the map [Drehmal: Apotheosis](https://www.drehmal.net/) 2.2.x.

## ⚠️**This modpack does NOT install the map itself.** You will need to install it manually. You can download it [here](https://drive.google.com/file/d/14p5Z7mGCRNh5qkEt4wkOdtlu1rD4G7_Q).

### New Features
- **🌐 e4mc** for easy multiplayer
  - Simply open your world to LAN, and it will give you a server link people can join!
- **🐎 Horse improvements**
  - Horses can now be ridden by 2 players
  - Horses can now slowly swim
  - Horses no longer randomly buck
  - Horses become transparent when looking down for better visibility
- **📦 Shulker and bundle improvements**
  - Shulkers can be opened without being placed, allowing for adventure mode use
  - Bundles and shulkers can be scrolled through, allowing specific item selection
- **🔭 Spyglass Improvements** for better spyglass utility 
  - Spyglasses can be used from anywhere in your inventory
  - (I recommend disabling WI Zoom for more immersion)
- **🧭 GUI Compass** for an immersive way to have coordinates on screen
  - Coordinates will be shown on screen if a compass is anywhere in your inventory

### NOTES
- Currently, the map does NOT work on the modrinth launcher due to how the modrinth directories are named. This will be fixed at a later date.

- This modpack is unofficial, and not created or maintained by the Drehmal team. I am not affiliated with them.

Thanks to Rift for letting me include the resourcepack!
